x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Work order resolution notes enable Now Assist FSM to learn from historical resolutions and suggest similar solutions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make resolution notes mandatory at work order closure via UI policy. Train field agents to document resolution steps via the mobile app. Target: 80%+ of closed work orders with resolution notes in the trailing 12 months.
